name: lockin-stablecoin-escrow
description: Production-grade plugin for planning and scaffolding a real stablecoin escrow and retainer dApp on Base.

interface.shortDescription: Investor-ready dApp architecture for USDC escrow, retainers, and onchain reputation.
interface.longDescription: Production-oriented plugin for a real-world stablecoin escrow product on Base, including product framing, chain research, contract design, backend modules, APIs, security, and delivery roadmap.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Base-first escrow dApp MVP.
Generate the monorepo structure for LockIn.
Write contract and API specs for milestones.
